    public partial global::Demo.NodeDto Map(global::Demo.Node n)
    {
        global::System.ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(n);
        var __dwarf_ctx = new global::DwarfMapper.DwarfRefContext(64, preserve: false, setNull: true);
        if (!__dwarf_ctx.TryEnterNode(n)) return null!;
        try
        {
            return new global::Demo.NodeDto
            {
                Next = __DwarfMap_Obj_global__Demo_Node_global__Demo_NodeDto_3F897622(n.Next!, __dwarf_ctx, 0),
                V = n.V,
            };
        }
        finally
        {
            __dwarf_ctx.ExitNode(n);
        }
    }
    private global::Demo.NodeDto __DwarfMap_Obj_global__Demo_Node_global__Demo_NodeDto_3F897622(global::Demo.Node s, global::DwarfMapper.DwarfRefContext ctx, int depth)
    {
        if (s is null) return null!;
        if (!ctx.TryEnterNode(s)) return null!;
        try
        {
            if (depth >= ctx.MaxDepth)
                throw new global::DwarfMapper.DwarfMappingDepthException(ctx.MaxDepth, depth);
            return new global::Demo.NodeDto
            {
                Next = __DwarfMap_Obj_global__Demo_Node_global__Demo_NodeDto_3F897622(s.Next!, ctx, depth + 1),
                V = s.V,
            };
        }
        finally
        {
            ctx.ExitNode(s);
        }
    }
